title: Layer 3: Water Distribution and Delivery
description: Schema for the delivery of treated/stored water to customers through pipes and other infrastructure, organized by pressure zones within the utility's water service area.

current_pressure_zones.description: Array of pressure zones currently in service within the utility service area.

current_pressure_zones_source.description: Citation for the overall list of current pressure zones in service.

future_pressure_zone_changes.description: Optional. Planned additions or expansions to pressure zones expected in the future.

change_type.description: Whether this entry represents an entirely new pressure zone or an expansion of an existing one.

zone_name.description: Name or identifier of the new or expanding pressure zone.

existing_zone_reference.description: If change_type is 'expansion_of_existing_zone', the name of the existing zone being expanded.

expected_year.description: Expected year the addition or expansion will be completed.

expected_year_source.description: Citation for the expected completion year.

description.description: Free-text description of the planned change (scope, rationale, affected areas).

description_source.description: Citation for the description of the planned change.

planned_zone_capacity.description: Planned total capacity of the new or expanded zone, if known.

planned_zone_capacity_source.description: Citation for the planned zone capacity.

geographic_area.description: Geographic area the new or expanded zone will cover, if known.

geographic_area_source.description: Citation for the geographic area of the planned change.

future_pressure_zone_changes_source.description: Citation for the overall list of future pressure zone additions/expansions.

pressure_zone.description: A single pressure zone within the utility service area, including its capacity, demand, fire flow reserve, and geographic coverage.

zone_name.description: Name or identifier of the pressure zone.

geographic_area.description: The specific geographic area covered by this pressure zone.

geographic_area_source.description: Citation for the geographic area of this zone.

hydraulic_pressure.description: Hydraulic pressure maintained within this zone, if available.

hydraulic_pressure_source.description: Citation for the hydraulic pressure data.

total_zone_capacity.description: Defined total capacity of this zone at the specified pressure, based on transmission mains, pump stations, and elevated storage.

total_zone_capacity_source.description: Citation for the total zone capacity.

current_total_peak_demand.description: Current total peak demand (residential + commercial + industrial) within this zone.

current_total_peak_demand_source.description: Citation for the current total peak demand.

fire_flow_reserve.description: Fire flow reserve allocated for this zone.

fire_flow_reserve_source.description: Citation for the fire flow reserve.

geographic_area.description: A geographic area definition. Provide one or more representations: a text description, a bounding box, and/or a GeoJSON polygon/multipolygon boundary.

description.description: Free-text description of the geographic area (e.g., 'North of Highway 290, west of MoPac Expressway').

bounding_box.description: Rectangular bounding box enclosing the area (WGS 84 decimal degrees).

geojson_boundary.description: GeoJSON Polygon or MultiPolygon geometry defining the zone boundary.

coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinate array. For Polygon: [[[lon,lat], ...]]. For MultiPolygon: [[[[lon,lat], ...]]].

volume_measurement.description: A numeric volume or flow-rate value with its unit of measurement.

unit.description: Unit of volume or flow-rate measurement.

citation.description: A data source citation consisting of a document title, URL, and optional page number.

page_number.description: Optional page number within the source document.
